channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Intercom, now called Fin, launches an AI agent whose only job is managing another AI agent
item.description: The company formerly known as Intercom just did something that no major customer service platform has attempted at scale: it built an AI agent whose sole job is to manage another AI agent.Fin Operator, announced Thursday at a live event in San Francisco, is a new AI-powered system designed specifically for the back-office teams that configure, monitor, and improve Fin, the company's customer-facing AI agent. Rather than replacing human support agents — which is what Fin itself does on the front lines — Operator targets the growing army of support operations professionals who spend their days u...

item.title: How RecursiveMAS speeds up multi-agent inference by 2.4x and reduces token usage by 75%
item.description: One of the key challenges of current multi-agent AI systems is that they communicate by generating and sharing text sequences, which introduces latency, drives up token costs, and makes it difficult to train the entire system as a cohesive unit. To overcome this challenge, researchers at University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign and Stanford University developed RecursiveMAS, a framework that enables agents to collaborate and transmit information through embedding space instead of text. This change results in both efficiency and performance gains. Experiments show that RecursiveMAS achieves accu...

item.title: “I think it can be a point of no return” — experts issue warning as Chinese EV manufacturers hunt for European manufacturing plants
item.description: Chinese EV makers are pushing into Europe with plans to snap up idle manufacturing facilities

item.title: Two hi-fi greats just announced cool, curved new stereo speakers — one's passive, one's active, take your pick
item.description: Wharfedale's Denton 1S and Fyne Audio's Cubit 5 speakers are compact, powerful and promise superb sound

item.title: The Best Outdoor Deals From the REI Anniversary Sale 2026
item.description: It’s the best time of year to pick up all the outdoor gadgets, tents, sleeping bags, and other gear you’ll need for summer fun.

item.title: ArXiv will ban researchers who upload papers full of AI slop
item.description: ArXiv, a popular platform for preprint academic research, is taking a new step to attempt to reduce the volume of papers that include AI slop. If a paper has "incontrovertible evidence that the authors did not check the results of LLM generation," such as hallucinated references or "meta-comments" left by an LLM, authors will be […]

item.title: I think therefore I am: cutting-edge AI used to 'revive spirit' of French Mark Twain and spawn a new sharp satire more than 350 years after his death
item.description: French researchers trained artificial intelligence on Molière’s writings, producing a theatrical comedy that premiered before audiences at Versailles Opera.

item.title: RJ Scaringe has raised more than $12 billion across three startups and investors still want more
item.description: Founder and CEO RJ Scaringe has a knack for raising money. So far, his three startups have raised more than $12.3 billion.

item.title: General Catalyst posted VC rage bait and it worked, especially on a16z
item.description: Compulsive X user Andreessen himself couldn't resist responding, many, many times.

item.title: Tesla Reveals New Details About Robotaxi Crashes—and the Humans Involved
item.description: Remote operators (slowly) drove the automaker’s autonomous vehicles into a metal fence and a construction barricade, Tesla says.

item.title: California lawmakers are working on a bill to preserve access to online games
item.description: Game preservation group Stop Killing Games advised on the bill.

item.title: ChatGPT power users can now link their bank accounts for personal finance advice
item.description: On May 15, OpenAI rolled out a ChatGPT personal finance experience to Pro users in the United States.

item.title: Summer Games Done Quick returns this July, schedule out now
item.description: Who's up for a Jak & Daxter / Half-Life hybrid?

item.title: Sony’s new AI camera feature is now a meme: Is the backlash the point?
item.description: What happens when a smartphone’s AI-powered camera tool makes pictures look worse? Maybe it doesn’t matter as long as it gets people talking. Artificial intelligence has notoriously struggled with creating images, writing out gibberish on signs, or adding extra fingers to people. But it doesn’t seem to be much help for photography either—and the internet is having a field day over it....

item.title: Marathon's future includes duo queues, more PvE modes and better onboarding
item.description: Bungie details how it plans to grow its extraction shooter.

item.title: See the Google 3D emojis planned for Pixel, Android 17
item.description: New 3D emoji designs are coming to Android 17.

item.title: « J'ai découvert une nouvelle pluie de météores, qui provient d'un astéroïde en train d'être désintégré par le Soleil »
item.description: Des milliers de caméras astronomiques observent le ciel chaque nuit pour photographier les météores qui traversent notre atmosphère. Les chercheurs en sciences planétaires utilisent ces observations pour mieux comprendre la poussière, les astéroïdes et les débris de comètes présents dans notre...
